_schema.purpose: Manual overrides for campaign-level data that can't be derived. Add entries by campaign ID.

fields.delivered: 'yes' | 'no' | null — did the campaign actually ship what it promised? null defaults to inheriting project status.
fields.projectSlug: string | null — manually link this campaign to a project when text matchers can't find it. Overrides the resolver.
fields.note: string — short reason. Shows up in tooltips.

abc12345-def6.note: title doesn't mention Selene but the recipient address matches
